name: deep-skills
description: The Deep-* series: /deep-plan → /deep-plan-review → /deep-implement → /deep-code-review (→ /deep-bugfix → re-review) → /deep-docs. A steerable, fresh-agent-resumable workflow for planning, reviewing, building, code-reviewing, and bug-fixing features, then mapping what's built into a context-window-aware orientation map — with a self-improving directive loop that learns from each review.
